==== propertyAndAccessorMerging.tlua (18 errors) ====
    // https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go/issues/3613
    
    interface EntityMetadata1 {
        get tableName(): string;
        set tableName(name: string);
    }
    
    interface EntityMetadata1 {
        tableName: string;
    }
    
    interface EntityMetadata2 {
        tableName: string;
    }
    
    interface EntityMetadata2 {
        get tableName(): string;
        set tableName(name: string);
    }
    
    class Foo1 {
    ~~~~~

        x: string
    }

        x: string
